day2_morning_wakeup_1.name: Me
day2_morning_wakeup_1.text: *The alarm goes off. I open my eyes. Day 2.*

day2_morning_wakeup_2.name: Me
day2_morning_wakeup_2.text: *Less nervous than yesterday. Maybe my body's starting to adjust to the school routine.*

day2_morning_wakeup_4.name: Me
day2_morning_wakeup_4.text: *The old school group chat... the read receipts went up. 'Read by 3'. They read it, but no replies.*

day2_morning_wakeup_6.name: Me
day2_morning_wakeup_6.text: *There's a message from Sea. Sent at 1 AM. 'Good night~'*

day2_morning_wakeup_7.name: Me
day2_morning_wakeup_7.text: *I arrive at the school gate... and Sea is standing there.*

day2_morning_gate_1.name: Han Sea
day2_morning_gate_1.text: Hey! I was waiting so we could walk together.

day2_morning_gate_2.name: Me
day2_morning_gate_2.text: ...You were waiting? What time did you get here?

day2_morning_gate_3.name: Han Sea
day2_morning_gate_3.text: Just a bit ago~ I live close by.

day2_morning_gate_4.name: Me
day2_morning_gate_4.text: *She was waiting? How did she even know when I'd arrive...*

day2_morning_gate_5.name: Me
day2_morning_gate_5.text: *From the gate to the classroom. Sea walks beside me.*

day2_morning_walk_1.name: Han Sea
day2_morning_walk_1.text: What did you do yesterday? At home.

day2_morning_walk_2.name: Me
day2_morning_walk_2.text: Made some instant noodles, scrolled on my phone, then went to sleep. Nothing much.

day2_morning_walk_3.name: Han Sea
day2_morning_walk_3.text: ...Do you eat instant noodles every day when you live alone?

day2_morning_walk_4.name: Me
day2_morning_walk_4.text: No, sometimes I get convenience store meals too.

day2_morning_walk_6.name: Me
day2_morning_walk_6.text: *Sea presses her fingers to her forehead in exasperation.*

day2_morning_walk_7.name: Han Sea
day2_morning_walk_7.text: I'll make you a lunch box from now on, so let's eat lunch together.

day2_morning_walk_8.name: Me
day2_morning_walk_8.text: ...Are you always this nice to people?

day2_morning_walk_9.name: Han Sea
day2_morning_walk_9.text: Who does this for just anyone? ...I'm doing this because it's you.

day2_morning_walk_10.name: Me
day2_morning_walk_10.text: *Sea walks ahead without looking back. I can't see her expression.*

day2_morning_walk_11.name: Han Sea
day2_morning_walk_11.text: Oh right, {name}, what kind of music do you listen to?

day2_morning_walk_12.name: Me
day2_morning_walk_12.text: I'm not picky about genres. I just listen to whatever sounds good.

day2_morning_walk_13.name: Han Sea
day2_morning_walk_13.text: Same. But lately I've been really into this artist. Their voice has this lonely vibe?

day2_morning_walk_14.name: Me
day2_morning_walk_14.text: *Sea shows me her phone. An indie band channel.*

day2_morning_walk_15.name: Me
day2_morning_walk_15.text: Oh, I know this song. It popped up in my algorithm once.

day2_morning_walk_17.name: Me
day2_morning_walk_17.text: *Sea looks pleased. Honestly, this kind of reaction feels pretty nice.*

day2_morning_deja4_1.name: Me
day2_morning_deja4_1.text: *Walking to class with Sea, I feel thirsty.*

day2_morning_deja4_2.name: Me
day2_morning_deja4_2.text: Hold on, where's the vending machine?

day2_morning_deja4_3.name: Me
day2_morning_deja4_3.text: *As I say it, I'm already naturally heading toward the staircase on the second floor.*

day2_morning_deja4_4.name: Han Sea
day2_morning_deja4_4.text: Oh, right. There's a vending machine there. ...But {name}, how did you know that?

day2_morning_deja4_5.name: Me
day2_morning_deja4_5.text: *...I don't know. Why did I come this way? Yesterday was my first time in this building.*

day2_morning_deja4_6.name: Me
day2_morning_deja4_6.text: Oh, I probably saw it when I passed by earlier.

day2_morning_class_2.name: Me
day2_morning_class_2.text: *Sea smiles. But for about half a second, there was a scrutinizing look in her eyes.*

day2_morning_class_3.name: Me
day2_morning_class_3.text: *Eunsu takes attendance. Names are called one by one.*

day2_morning_class_4.name: Me
day2_morning_class_4.text: *...It's done. But something feels missing. I glance behind me. Seolhwa is sitting in her seat. She's definitely there... but her name wasn't called during attendance.*

day2_morning_class_5.name: Me
day2_morning_class_5.text: *...Did I zone out and miss it? Nobody else seems bothered, so maybe that's just how it is.*

day2_morning_class_6.name: Eunsu
day2_morning_class_6.text: By the way, {name}, have you heard anything from your previous school?

day2_morning_pres_1.name: Eunsu
day2_morning_pres_1.text: Transferring takes a while for the paperwork to go through. Let me know if they contact you.

day2_morning_pres_2.name: Me
day2_morning_pres_2.text: *First period, Korean Language. Eunsu teaches the class.*

day2_morning_pres_3.name: Eunsu
day2_morning_pres_3.text: Today we have group presentations. The topic is 'My Favorite Place.'

day2_morning_pres_4.name: Me
day2_morning_pres_4.text: *Looking at the group assignments, I'm with Sea and a boy I don't really know.*

day2_morning_pres_5.name: Han Sea
day2_morning_pres_5.text: We're in the same group! What should we do? We need to pick a topic.

day2_morning_pres_6.text: A cafe or something? Honestly, anything's fine, right?

day2_morning_pres_7.name: Me
day2_morning_pres_7.text: Hmm... how about the library? It's quiet.

day2_morning_pres_8.name: Han Sea
day2_morning_pres_8.text: Nice. Should I make the slides?

day2_morning_pres_9.name: Me
day2_morning_pres_9.text: I'll present, and how about you look up the materials?

day2_morning_pres_11.name: Me
day2_morning_pres_11.text: *Sea gives a thumbs up. It doesn't feel like we just met yesterday.*

day2_morning_pres_12.name: Me
day2_morning_pres_12.text: *It's our turn to present. I go up to the front and speak without getting nervous. Maybe because Sea is down there nodding along as she listens.*

day2_morning_deja5_1.name: Eunsu
day2_morning_deja5_1.text: {name}, great presentation. You must have presented a lot at your previous school.

day2_morning_deja5_3.name: Me
day2_morning_deja5_3.text: *I can't remember. Did I present at my old school? ...I must have. Otherwise I wouldn't be this comfortable with it.*

day2_morning_deja5_4.name: Me
day2_morning_deja5_4.text: *Break time. Eunsu comes to my desk.*

day2_morning_deja5_5.name: Eunsu
day2_morning_deja5_5.text: Settling in okay? You look brighter than yesterday.

day2_morning_deja5_6.name: Me
day2_morning_deja5_6.text: *She lightly pats my shoulder. — It's cold. Her hand is cold. But this coldness feels... familiar. This sensation of a hand resting on my shoulder. This temperature. I feel like I've felt this before —*

day2_morning_deja5_9.name: Me
day2_morning_deja5_9.text: *It's just my imagination. The air conditioning must be turned up too high.*

day2_morning_deja5_10.name: Eunsu
day2_morning_deja5_10.text: If anything's bothering you, tell me. I'm your homeroom teacher, after all.

day2_morning_deja5_11.name: Me
day2_morning_deja5_11.text: *She smiles and walks away. She's a warm person... so why are her hands so cold.*

day2_morning_seolhwa_2.name: Me
day2_morning_seolhwa_2.text: *Break time. I glance behind me. My eyes meet Seolhwa's.*

day2_morning_seolhwa_3.name: Me
day2_morning_seolhwa_3.text: *...This time, she doesn't look away. She's watching me. Quietly.*

day2_morning_seolhwa_4.name: Me
day2_morning_seolhwa_4.text: *Seolhwa's expression... it looks like she wants to say something, but she ends up closing her mouth. Maybe she's not good at conversation.*

day2_morning_seolhwa_5.name: Me
day2_morning_seolhwa_5.text: *The kid next to me glances at the back row while chatting, but doesn't even notice Seolhwa. Well, people don't usually pay attention to the quiet ones. The teacher says "Pay attention!" so I turn back to the front.*
